content_body: What a wonderful experience to stay in Serendipity!  I am scouting it and the entire Blue Ridge area for a TV show called "Getting Away Together" airing on PBS across the country.  We will be back in June for our taping and I know the episode and the home will be fabulous.  Our cast members can't wait to experience Serendipity and Experience Blue Ridge.  See you on TV!  Pineridge film Television, "Getting Away Together", www.gettingawaytogether.com
title: Scout Trip for "Getting Away Together" TV Show
